title: cranichis revoluta
intro: Cranichis revoluta, also known as the twisted lip orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various folk medicines for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Cranichis revoluta include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots or leaves in hot water, or by using it in a decoction, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
